subject: feat(foundation): scaffold Phase 0 — Vite + React + TypeScript project with routing, types, and store
body:
Sets up the complete project foundation for the form builder:
- Vite 6 + React 19 + TypeScript with Tailwind CSS and PWA support
- Form definition TypeScript schema (the builder/renderer contract)
- Zustand store with all builder actions (field/page CRUD, reorder, save status)
- API client wrapper for Vercel backend + Supabase client
- React Router with 7 routes (form list, builder, preview, responses, public form, 404)
- Shell pages for all routes with three-panel builder layout
- Build passes clean: tsc + vite build (~75 kB gzipped)

Tags: foundation, scaffold, react, typescript, tailwind, zustand, routing
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: form-builder
Semver: minor
